name: Easy Foolproof Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, combine sugar, milk, and butter.
2. Bring mixture to a boil until it reaches 236°F on a candy thermometer (soft ball stage).
3. Remove from heat and stir in the remaining ingredients.
4. Stir until chocolate is melted and mixture is well blended.
5. Spread evenly into a buttered 9-inch square pan.
6. Allow to cool until firm.
7. Cut into pieces of desired sizes.
8. Store in an airtight container in a cool, dry place.
